arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta pushes Arsenal to sign the ‘new Lamine Yamal’
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is pushing for Arsenal to sign a Barcelona wonderkid who has been labelled as the ‘new Lamine Yamal ’. Although he is older than the 17-year-old Yamal, who inspired Spain to Euro 2024 glory this summer, Pradas has been described as something of a clone of his Barcelona teammate.

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted XI vs Alaves: no debut for Wojciech Szczesny
arts.sum: Barcelona have travelled to Vitoria to face Deportivo Alaves in La Liga action on Sunday afternoon off the back of a 5-0 midweek win against Young Boys in the Champions…

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Barcelona are aiming to redeem themselves following last weekend's shock 4-2 defeat to Osasuna in La Liga when they visit Deportivo Alaves on Sunday. La Blaugrana secured a 5-0 Champions League victory against a woeful Young Boys side to bounce back from last weekend's surprise defeat but with Clasico rivals Real Madrid hunting them down domestically, Hansi Flick can't afford any more slip-ups in La Liga.

The match sees eleventh take on first in the table, and with both sides having lost last time out in the league, there will be an eagerness to return to winning ways before the upcoming international break. Time for another league game as FC Barcelona travel for to Vitoria to fulfil their LaLiga gameweek 9 fixture against Alavés.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make €7m saving as former player’s unfair dismissal appeal rejected by Supreme Court
arts.sum: Over the last three years, Barcelona have been embroiled in a legal battle with their former player, Matheus Fernandes. The 26-year-old signed in January 2020, but after failing to make any impact in Catalonia, this contract was terminated 18 months later, with the club stating that he did not have “the physical, technical level and […] The post Barcelona make €7m saving as former player’s unfair dismissal appeal rejected by Supreme Court appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals state of play on Erling Haaland to Barcelona
arts.sum: “ Erling Haaland – Barcelona have been linked with Manchester City ’s star player in the Spanish press, but my honest feeling is that predicting what Barca will do now for summer 2025 would be completely made up stuff,” Romano said. Erling Haaland has been heavily linked with a summer move to Barcelona in 2025, but Fabrizio Romano has called for calm.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Alaves-Barcelona: Unchanged line-up planned by Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s victory over Villarreal on Saturday has seen them draw level on points with Barcelona at the top of La Liga. The Catalans can re-establish their three-point lead on Sunday afternoon when they make the trip to Alaves for their MD9 fixture. arts.ttl: Financial Fair Play could be key as Barcelona linked with stunning Erling Haaland transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland has been linked with Barcelona as a top target for summer 2025, but Fabrizio Romano has called for calm amid all the latest transfer speculation. arts.ttl: Sunday's La Liga predictions including Alaves vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Alaves vs. Barcelona.

RB: Jules Kounde - Despite a flurry of injuries across Barca's squad, Kounde has proved a reliable provider at right-back so far this season. The Catalan giants have made a remarkable start to the Hansi Flick era and have won seven of their opening eight matches in La Liga.
